resume.name: Artemii Bakharev
resume.title: Full-Stack Web Developer / AI Automation Builder

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science - Data Science

paragraphs.text: I build full-stack products, automations, and internal tools that solve practical business problems. My work combines Next.js, React, Node.js, APIs, SQL, cloud infrastructure, and AI integrations to turn ideas into reliable systems people can use every day.
highlights: full-stack products, automations, and internal tools
Next.js, React, Node.js, APIs, SQL, cloud infrastructure, and AI integrations

paragraphs.text: I am proactive by nature and like taking ownership early, whether that means structuring a new SaaS idea, automating repetitive workflows, or improving a product until it becomes genuinely useful. I enjoy building software that helps people work faster, make better decisions, and reduce wasted effort.
highlights: helps people work faster, make better decisions, and reduce wasted effort

paragraphs.text: Alongside development, I bring product thinking, communication, and project ownership, so I can contribute not only as an engineer but also as someone trusted to drive new IT projects forward in a professional, organized way.
paragraphs.footer: Open to opportunities in software engineering, automation, and new product development.

achievements.title: UCSI Cyber Security Hackathon 2025
achievements.details: Placed 3rd Runner-Up after solving live, on-site challenges (3 hours). Gained practical cybersecurity lessons and loved the team collaboration.

achievements.title: The Dev Challenge 2025
achievements.details: Ranked in the top 50% among developers worldwide in this coding challenge.

achievements.title: FireHacks 2024 Winner
achievements.details: Won 1st place for building Pollution Zero, an innovative environmental monitoring platform.

experiences.title: Fulhive Sdn Bhd
experiences.subtitle: AI & Data Analysis Intern
experiences.fullTitle: Fulhive Sdn Bhd – AI & Data Analysis Intern
experiences.description: Developed SaaS product prototypes for retail businesses focused on AI-powered insights, sales analysis, and forecasting. Built automation for Shopee ad management and contributed to an internal document-filling tool for a Singapore construction company, combining practical business needs with scalable product thinking.

experiences.title: CaseClicker.online
experiences.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer
experiences.description: Developed CaseClicker.online, a full-stack web application integrating APIs for ad management, authentication, encryption, and cloud infrastructure. Engineered a secure backend, a responsive frontend, and scalable cloud solutions to ensure a seamless user experience.

experiences.title: VIP Auto Trans Inc
experiences.subtitle: IT Assistant / HR
experiences.description: Freelanced at VIP Auto Trans Inc, providing IT support and HR services. Designed digital assets, assisted with recruitment, and implemented employee benefits strategies to optimize business operations.

experiences.title: Venkon Group
experiences.subtitle: Video Editor Intern
experiences.description: Interned at Venkon Group in the IT department, working on video editing, graphic design, and digital advertising. Designed promotional materials and created a marketing video, enhancing brand outreach.

experiences.title: National Children's Center
experiences.subtitle: Medical Clerk (Volunteer)
experiences.description: Volunteered at the National Children's Medical Center of Tashkent, assisting with patient vital signs, sterilization processes, instrument packaging, and digital record management.

projects.title: AdsGuard - Automated Ad Spend Protection for Shopee Sellers
projects.description: Built AdsGuard, a SaaS web application that automates Shopee ad campaign management to help sellers maximize revenue while protecting their budget. The platform connects to the Shopee Open Platform API, lets users define custom daily budgets and ROAS limits, and uses cron-based monitoring to scale campaigns after sales or pause underperforming ads before losses grow. It also includes daily ad scheduling, secure store connection, and Cloudflare-protected authentication.

projects.title: Optishelv Lite - AI-Powered Retail Analytics
projects.description: Developed Optishelv Lite during my internship at Fulhive Sdn Bhd, a web application that helps store owners grow revenue by learning from their transaction data. Users can upload CSV or XLSX sales files, then the system uses AI to categorize inventory, identify strong-selling trends, uncover product gaps, and generate specific Shopee-linked stocking recommendations with images. I also implemented the freemium access flow with a Supabase-based sign-up gate after the first free analysis.

projects.title: Global Cars – Car Dealership Website
projects.description: Global Cars is a Nizhny Novgorod–based dealership specializing in buying, selling, and importing used cars from the USA and Europe. For their website I performed competitor analysis, designed a new logo and UI/UX, built an inventory dashboard, implemented a Prisma-powered database with server-side image storage, optimized the site for SEO, and deployed the production site to a VPS. Delivered features include the Main Page and a searchable Car Catalogue.

projects.title: StartupSeed – Platform for Startups and Investors
projects.description: StartupSeed is a concept platform connecting startup founders and investors across Malaysia. I built the prototype frontend and core flows: public and private startup listings, investor discovery and filtering, a Business Model Canvas tool, a business-analyzer page, and a basic secondary-market concept for early exits. Focus was on founder-first UX, efficient discovery, and low-fee monetization model to encourage adoption.

projects.title: CollabCode – Winner at The Dev Challenge
projects.description: Developed CollabCode, a real-time, browser-based coding platform that secured a winning position at The Dev Challenge, standing out among 203 projects for its impact on coding education. Engineered live coding sessions, classroom management tools, peer collaboration features, and gamified progress tracking. Built a scalable, secure system that allows seamless interaction with zero local setup, enhancing accessibility for students and educators worldwide.

projects.title: A3t Team Website – Frontend Developer
projects.description: Designed and developed an interactive, visually engaging website for A3t, showcasing team projects, hackathon participation, and business collaborations. Implemented dynamic themes inspired by popular games and ensured seamless performance across devices.

projects.title: Turn of Life – Multiplayer Game Developer
projects.description: Developed Turn of Life, a real-time multiplayer party game blending Monopoly, The Game of Life, and Jackbox elements. Engineered live gameplay, dynamic board mechanics, and interactive mini-games. Implemented WebSocket-based communication for seamless player interactions.

projects.title: Telegram Scraper AI – AI Engineer & Developer
projects.description: Developed Telegram Scraper AI, an advanced tool leveraging OpenAI and Telethon to extract and analyze chat data securely. Integrated AI-driven insights for travel planning, financial safety, and community monitoring with multilingual support.

projects.title: Pollution Zero – Hackathon Winner (1st Place)
projects.description: Built Pollution Zero, an award-winning web-based simulation game tackling environmental challenges. Implemented AI-driven analytics, real-world environmental problem-solving, and interactive mapping. Achieved 1st place in FireHacks Fall 2024 for innovation and impact.
